caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is positioned in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is seated in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a boom arm, which is positioned close to his mouth. The background consists of dark gray acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. The man's white t-shirt features a small logo on the left chest that includes the word "Authentic". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and expression; he begins by looking forward and speaking, then turns his head slightly to his right with a smile, briefly looks back toward the center with a smirk, and finally turns back to the right while smiling. His movements are subtle, focusing on his facial expressions and head orientation while remaining stationary in front of the equipment.
